operational_knowledge_units.title: Unplanned restart check references backup WCS host and SQL Server Agent status
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that for an unplanned restart scenario, the operator/support user should RDP into the backup WCS host and verify in SQL Server Configuration Manager that SQL Server Agent is running.
observed_evidence: Visible text: "Open sql server configuration manager"
Visible text: "and make sure SLQ server agent is"
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Services unplanned restart: RDP into fortna-wcs-backup.txrth.otnet.ups.com, open SQL Server Configuration Manager, and make sure SQL Server Agent is running.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Verify SQL Server Agent is running on backup WCS host during unplanned restart
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide states to RDP into the backup WCS server, open SQL Server Configuration Manager, and ensure SQL Server Agent is running.

steps.expected_outcome: Remote session is opened on the backup WCS host.
steps.visual_region_hint: Main slide text area containing the line 'Rdp into fortna-wcs-' and hostname continuation.

steps.expected_outcome: SQL Server Configuration Manager is open on the host.
steps.validation_check: The SQL Server Configuration Manager application is visible.
steps.visual_region_hint: Main slide text area containing 'Open sql server configuration manager'.

steps.instruction: Make sure SQL Server Agent is running.
steps.expected_outcome: SQL Server Agent is confirmed to be in the running state.
steps.validation_check: SQL Server Agent status shows running.
steps.visual_region_hint: Main slide text area containing 'make sure SLQ server agent is running'.

warnings: The slide does not provide remediation steps if SQL Server Agent is not running.
The slide text appears to contain a typo: 'SLQ server agent' likely refers to 'SQL Server Agent'.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Unplanned restart validation: RDP to fortna-wcs-backup.txrth.otnet.ups.com, open SQL Server Configuration Manager, and verify SQL Server Agent is running.
